items.name: Rotating Status
items.author: VRC Nexus
items.description: Cycles a few chatbox messages every 15 seconds. A good starting template.

payload.code:
import random

async def main():
    messages = [
        "✨ Powered by VRC Nexus",
        "🌐 Community Hub example script",
        "👋 Say hi!",
    ]
    while True:
        chatbox(random.choice(messages))
        await wait(15)

create_task(main())

async def rainbow_cycle():
    while True:
        for i in range(0, 200):
            n = i if i <= 100 else 200 - i
            set_hue(n / 100)
            set_emission(n / 100)
            await wait(0.08)

create_task(rainbow_cycle())
